records.ety: [OE. sautrie, OF. psalterie, F. psaltrion, L. psalterium psaltery, psalter, from Gr. <?/, fr. <?/. See Psalm, Psalter.]

defs: A stringed instrument of music used by the Hebrews, the form of which is not known.
quotes: Praise the Lord with harp; sing unto him with the psaltery and an instrument of ten strings.
